title: Each cycle has a marked trend, and this is AI
author: chicadepanem
selftext:
In crypto we have already experienced the era of ICOs, DeFi, NFTs, memecoins and now what is setting the market trend is AI. 

But more than just a change in trend, It appears that AI is changing the infrastructure of markets. 

I've been looking at AI tokens on BingX lately and I'm participating in OpenAI's pre-IPO. I don't want to miss out this time. 

I believe this time it won't be a passing fad, because AI is already making its way into many everyday aspects of our lives.

comments.author: Smooth_Process_315
comments.body: What coins are you looking at
